event: Outdoor Dining at a Parisian Cafe
description: A richly detailed scene of an outdoor Parisian cafe or restaurant gathering. Elegantly dressed men and women in late 19th-century attire sit at white-cloth-covered tables laden with glasses and dishes. In the foreground, a woman in a brown patterned dress with a feathered red hat turns to look over her shoulder. Behind her, men in top hats and dark suits converse. Waiters in white attend the tables. In the background, a classical building facade with statuary niches and an awning-covered terrace rise above the crowd. Plants and flowers decorate the space.
